title: Experience cutting edge luxury home cinema with Barco Residential
bodyHtml:
Experience cutting edge luxury home cinema with Barco Residential

Barco introduced Runar and TruePix Bifrost TP-I, two new groundbreaking LED walls for luxury home cinema at CEDIA 2025. Barco Runar is the first LED wall designed for DCI-certified HDR performance in the residential market, while TruePix Bifrost TP-I delivers exceptional brightness and energy efficiency for high-ambient-light spaces.  In addition, Barco Residential showcased its most advanced projector platform Heimdall offering ultra-quiet, RGB laser-powered projection for an immersive cinematic experience.

‍

‍

Introducing Runar: The pinnacle of LED video walls for the residential market

For the first time ever, Barco Residential presents Runar, an LED wall designed exclusively for luxury home cinema and scheduled for DCI (Digital Cinema Initiatives) certification under the latest HDR (High Dynamic Range) standards - the highest bar today for cinema LED.  With a 0.9mm pixel pitch and native DCI 4K resolution (4,096 x 2,160), Runar brings uncompromising cinematic quality into the home.

More than a display, Barco Runar is a statement of presence.  Behind minimalist design is extraordinary power, inspired by the quiet strength and elemental purity of the Nordic heritage that inspired it. Barco Runar combines precision and elegance with technical prowess to create an immersive experience that commands attention without ever raising its voice.

Barco Runar features state-of-the-art Micro LED in Package (MIP) technology and is engineered for future-proof compliance with premium DCI-HDR content. It delivers breathtaking contrast and color precision, with 100,000:1 contrast, ultra-deep 0.005 cd/m2black level, and full DCI-P3 coverage.  Engineered for exceptional HDR performance, Runar brings DCI-grade HDR at 300 nits and consumer HDR at 500 nits to life with remarkable accuracy, while also handling standard content effortlessly.

‍

Barco Runar is scheduled to ship in mid-2026.

‍

‍

TruePix Bifrost TP-I: Brilliance meets efficiency

Barco Residential also showed the new TruePix Bifrost DV-LED wall, TP0.9-I.  This remarkable residential design benefits from unique Flip Chip technology, making it more robust, more energy efficient and further improving the black levels for spectacular contrast.

TruePix Bifrost TP0.9-I is the perfect DV-LED solution for brighter rooms and applications with higher ambient light. It offers 0.9 mm pixel pitch for high resolution and more than 1,800 nit brightness (and in peak brightness over 2,300 nit) which further enhances the contrast and detail of the displayed content. This also contributes to the more dramatic display of HDR content.  Power consumption is minimized and energy efficiency is doubled.

As with all of Barco Residential’s DV-LED products, TP-I includes its exceptional White Glove Service install, assuring outstanding results in every video wall.
